example: I have a picture frame with a family photo on my desk.
I placed my bag on the empty chair next to me.
I cleared the table after dinner and washed the dishes.
I spilled some coffee on the sofa, so I quickly cleaned it up.
I have a bedside table next to my bed for my books and glasses.
The cabinet doors are made of glass, allowing us to see inside.
I opened the fridge to get a bottle of water.
She watched her favorite show on the TV last night.
I accidentally burned my hand on the hot stove.
